zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Sigel於大約1595年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧林特海姆時，她的父親Peter Sigel25歲，母親Magdalena Sigel22歲。她於1616年4月6日與Hans Weber在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1646年10月5日在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Sigel于大约1595年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧林特海姆时，她的父亲Peter Sigel25岁，母亲Magdalena Sigel22岁。她于1616年4月6日与Hans Weber在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1646年10月5日在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sigel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Isadore, Mort, Naum.

variants.name: Siegel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Emanuel, Yetta, Aron, Avrom, Chaim, Hyam, Isadore, Isidor.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a maker of seals or signet rings, or for an official in charge of a seal, from Middle High German sigel ‘seal’. The Jewish surname can also be artificial.
German: from a medieval personal name, a pet form of the various ancient Germanic personal names formed with sigi ‘victory’ as the first element, for example Siegfried .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Sigel was born about 1595, in Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, her father, Peter Sigel, was 25 and her mother, Magdalena Sigel, was 22. She married Hans Weber on 6 April 1616, in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 5 October 1646, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Sigel est née environ 1595, à Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, son père, Peter Sigel, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Magdalena Sigel, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hans Weber le 6 avril 1616, à Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 octobre 1646, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Sigel um 1595 in Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Sigel 25 und ihre Mutter Magdalena Sigel 22. Sie hat am 6. April 1616 in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Hans Weber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Oktober 1646 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Sigel è nata il circa 1595 nel Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, sua padre, Peter Sigel, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Magdalena Sigel, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Hans Weber il 6 aprile 1616, nel Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 ottobre 1646, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Sigelが約1595年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘリンスエイムで生まれた時，父Peter Sigelは25歳，母Magdalena Sigelは22歳であった。1616年4月6日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘハグスフエルドでHans Weberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1646年10月5日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Sigel(이)가 대략 1595년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 린테임에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Sigel(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Magdalena Sigel(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1616년 4월 6일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 하그스펠드에서 Hans Weber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1646년 10월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Sigel nasceu aproximadamente 1595, em Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, seu pai, Peter Sigel, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Magdalena Sigel, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Weber em 6 de abril de 1616, em Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1646, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Sigel родилась около 1595 г. в местности ринтим, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, её отцу по имени Peter Sigel было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdalena Sigel, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Weber 6 апреля 1616 г. в местности хагсфелд, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 октября 1646 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Sigel nació aproximadamente 1595, en Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, su papá, Peter Sigel, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Magdalena Sigel, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hans Weber el 6 de abril de 1616, en Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1646, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
